svg.text: A workflow improves dramatically when AI is used for first drafts and pattern synthesis, but degrades when AI is treated as final authority.
Start with the concrete case: A workflow improves dramatically when AI is used for first drafts and pattern synthesis, but degrades when AI is treated as final authority.
Name the hidden structure: Strength radar showing ideation, drafting, transformation, summarization, and pattern synthesis.
Watch for the trap: Using generative AI where final judgment still matters most.
Transfer the habit immediately: Design a first-draft-plus-human-review workflow for one recurring task.

Unlike broad intro courses, this lesson turns where generative ai is strongest into a practical operating skill through a real scenario, a visual model, a retrieval gate, and a transfer task built around AI trust calibration, real-world workflows, and verification discipline.
Using generative AI where final judgment still matters most.

Design a first-draft-plus-human-review workflow for one recurring task.
The goal is not to memorize the idea, but to build a repeatable habit for AI-assisted work. Ask the learner to produce a concrete artifact, not just an opinion.
